# Python cache files
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Virtual Environment
venv/
env/
.venv/

# Environment variables
.env
.env.*

# Flask
instance/
*.log

# Database files
*.db
*.sqlite
*.sqlite3

# ML generated files
*.pkl
*.joblib

# Generated reports
reports/

# Uploaded files
uploads/

# IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/

# Operating system files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.bak
